title: Dreamy Dense Dutch Turkish Delight Pancakes
description: Tangy and shattering Dutch pancakes featuring Turkish Delight, perfect for a brunch mood, made with ayurvedic tamasic friendly ingredients.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs and milk.
Add the melted butter to the egg mixture and whisk until combined.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined, being careful not to overmix.
Gently fold in the chopped Turkish Delight.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the skillet or griddle.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Immediately after cooking, submerge the pancakes in an ice bath to stop the cooking process and create a shattering texture.
